50.$description: Primitive · Amber scale · #FFFBEB · Lightest amber tint. Warning-subtle background in light mode.

100.$description: Primitive · Amber scale · #FEF3C7 · Light amber. Available for additional warning tinting.

200.$description: Primitive · Amber scale · #FDE68A · Medium-light amber. Available for additional warning tinting.

300.$description: Primitive · Amber scale · #FCD34D · Soft amber. Available for warning highlights.

400.$description: Primitive · Amber scale · #FBBF24 · Accessible amber on dark surfaces. Warning text and icons in dark mode.

500.$description: Primitive · Amber scale · #F59E0B · Core warning amber. Reference via color/background/warning.

600.$description: Primitive · Amber scale · #D97706 · Darker amber for warning text, borders, and icons in light mode.

700.$description: Primitive · Amber scale · #B45309 · Deep amber step. Available for deep warning tinting.

800.$description: Primitive · Amber scale · #92400E · Deeper amber step.

900.$description: Primitive · Amber scale · #78350F · Darkest standard amber.

950.$description: Primitive · Amber scale · #451A03 · Deepest amber. Warning-subtle background in dark mode.

50.$description: Primitive · Red scale · #FEF2F2 · Lightest red tint. Danger subtle background in light mode.

100.$description: Primitive · Red scale · #FEE2E2 · Light red. Available for additional danger tinting.

200.$description: Primitive · Red scale · #FECACA · Medium-light red. Available for additional danger tinting.

300.$description: Primitive · Red scale · #FCA5A5 · Soft red. Available for danger highlights on dark surfaces.

400.$description: Primitive · Red scale · #F87171 · Accessible red on dark surfaces. Available for danger accents.

500.$description: Primitive · Red scale · #EF4444 · Mid red. Used for danger text/icons in dark mode.

600.$description: Primitive · Red scale · #DC2626 · Core danger red. Reference via color/background/danger or color/text/danger.

700.$description: Primitive · Red scale · #B91C1C · Darker red for danger hover states.

800.$description: Primitive · Red scale · #991B1B · Deep red step. Available for deep danger tinting.

900.$description: Primitive · Red scale · #7F1D1D · Darkest standard red.

950.$description: Primitive · Red scale · #450A0A · Deepest red. Danger-subtle background in dark mode.

0.$description: Primitive · Neutral scale · #FFFFFF · Pure white. Default page background in light mode and inverse text.

50.$description: Primitive · Neutral scale · #F8FAFC · Off-white. Subtle surface and assistant message background in light mode.

100.$description: Primitive · Neutral scale · #F1F5F9 · Light gray. Sunken surfaces, disabled backgrounds, inline code in light mode.

200.$description: Primitive · Neutral scale · #E2E8F0 · Soft gray. Default border color in light mode.

300.$description: Primitive · Neutral scale · #CBD5E1 · Medium-light gray. Disabled icon color in light mode.

400.$description: Primitive · Neutral scale · #94A3B8 · Mid gray. Disabled and subtlest text; subtle icon color in light mode.

500.$description: Primitive · Neutral scale · #64748B · Medium gray. Subtlest text in dark mode.

600.$description: Primitive · Neutral scale · #475569 · Dark-medium gray. Default icon color and subtle text in light mode.

700.$description: Primitive · Neutral scale · #334155 · Dark gray. Neutral-subtle surface and default border in dark mode.

800.$description: Primitive · Neutral scale · #1E293B · Darker gray. Neutral surface, raised, and assistant surface in dark mode.

900.$description: Primitive · Neutral scale · #0F172A · Near-black. Default page background in dark mode; primary text in light mode.

1000.$description: Primitive · Neutral scale · #0A1628 · Very dark. Sunken surface in dark mode.

1100.$description: Primitive · Neutral scale · #060D1C · Almost black. Deep surface reserved for extreme contrast needs.

1200.$description: Primitive · Neutral scale · #020509 · Darkest neutral. Reserved for maximum depth.

white.$description: Primitive · Anchor · #FFFFFF · Alias for neutral/0. Used explicitly for on-color text (e.g. white text on filled buttons).

black.$description: Primitive · Anchor · #000000 · Pure black. Base for alpha/black overlay scale.

100.$description: Primitive · Alpha · rgba(255,255,255,0.04) · 4% white overlay. Subtle highlight on dark surfaces.

200.$description: Primitive · Alpha · rgba(255,255,255,0.08) · 8% white overlay. Hover state tint on dark surfaces.

300.$description: Primitive · Alpha · rgba(255,255,255,0.12) · 12% white overlay. Active state tint on dark surfaces.

400.$description: Primitive · Alpha · rgba(255,255,255,0.20) · 20% white overlay. Medium highlight on dark surfaces.

500.$description: Primitive · Alpha · rgba(255,255,255,0.36) · 36% white overlay. Strong overlay for dark-mode scrims.

600.$description: Primitive · Alpha · rgba(255,255,255,0.60) · 60% white overlay. High-opacity scrim on dark surfaces.

100.$description: Primitive · Alpha · rgba(0,0,0,0.04) · 4% black overlay. Subtle dimming on light surfaces.

200.$description: Primitive · Alpha · rgba(0,0,0,0.08) · 8% black overlay. Hover tint on light surfaces.

300.$description: Primitive · Alpha · rgba(0,0,0,0.12) · 12% black overlay. Active tint on light surfaces.

400.$description: Primitive · Alpha · rgba(0,0,0,0.20) · 20% black overlay. Medium dimming on light surfaces.

500.$description: Primitive · Alpha · rgba(0,0,0,0.36) · 36% black overlay. Default modal/drawer scrim in light mode.

600.$description: Primitive · Alpha · rgba(0,0,0,0.60) · 60% black overlay. Strong scrim for dialogs in dark mode.

50.$description: Primitive · Indigo scale · #EEF2FF · Lightest indigo tint. Primary-subtle surfaces and user message backgrounds in light mode.

100.$description: Primitive · Indigo scale · #E0E7FF · Light indigo. Available for hover states or additional tinting.

200.$description: Primitive · Indigo scale · #C7D2FE · Medium-light indigo. Available for additional primary tinting.

300.$description: Primitive · Indigo scale · #A5B4FC · Soft indigo. Used for primary active/pressed states in dark mode.

400.$description: Primitive · Indigo scale · #818CF8 · Accessible indigo on dark surfaces. Used for dark-mode primary text, icons, and hover fills.

500.$description: Primitive · Indigo scale · #6366F1 · Mid-range indigo. Primary action color in dark mode; start point of the AI gradient.

600.$description: Primitive · Indigo scale · #4F46E5 · Core primary indigo. Primary action color in light mode. Reference via color/background/primary.

700.$description: Primitive · Indigo scale · #4338CA · Darker indigo for hover states over primary actions in light mode.

800.$description: Primitive · Indigo scale · #3730A3 · Deep indigo for active/pressed states in light mode.

900.$description: Primitive · Indigo scale · #312E81 · Darkest standard indigo. Available for deep tinting.

950.$description: Primitive · Indigo scale · #1E1B4B · Deepest indigo. Primary-subtle and user message backgrounds in dark mode.

50.$description: Primitive · Emerald scale · #ECFDF5 · Lightest emerald tint. Success-subtle background in light mode.

100.$description: Primitive · Emerald scale · #D1FAE5 · Light emerald. Available for additional success tinting.

200.$description: Primitive · Emerald scale · #A7F3D0 · Medium-light emerald. Available for additional success tinting.

300.$description: Primitive · Emerald scale · #6EE7B7 · Soft emerald. Available for success highlights on dark surfaces.

400.$description: Primitive · Emerald scale · #34D399 · Accessible emerald on dark surfaces. Available for success accents.

500.$description: Primitive · Emerald scale · #10B981 · Mid-range emerald. Success text and icons in dark mode.

600.$description: Primitive · Emerald scale · #059669 · Core success emerald. Reference via color/background/success or color/text/success.

700.$description: Primitive · Emerald scale · #047857 · Darker emerald for success hover states.

800.$description: Primitive · Emerald scale · #065F46 · Deep emerald step. Available for deep success tinting.

900.$description: Primitive · Emerald scale · #064E3B · Darkest standard emerald.

950.$description: Primitive · Emerald scale · #022C22 · Deepest emerald. Success-subtle background in dark mode.

50.$description: Primitive · Coral scale · #FFF7ED · Lightest coral tint. Brand-subtle background in light mode.

100.$description: Primitive · Coral scale · #FFEDD5 · Light coral. Available for additional brand tinting.

200.$description: Primitive · Coral scale · #FED7AA · Medium-light coral. Available for additional brand tinting.

300.$description: Primitive · Coral scale · #FDBA74 · Soft coral. Brand active/pressed state in dark mode.

400.$description: Primitive · Coral scale · #FB923C · Accessible coral on dark surfaces. Brand hover fills, text, and icons in dark mode.

500.$description: Primitive · Coral scale · #F97316 · Core brand coral. The signature brand color. Reference via color/background/brand.

600.$description: Primitive · Coral scale · #EA580C · Darker coral for brand hover states and brand text in light mode.

700.$description: Primitive · Coral scale · #C2410C · Deep coral for brand active/pressed states in light mode.

800.$description: Primitive · Coral scale · #9A3412 · Deeper coral step. Available for deep brand tinting.

900.$description: Primitive · Coral scale · #7C2D12 · Darkest standard coral.

950.$description: Primitive · Coral scale · #431407 · Deepest coral. Brand-subtle background in dark mode.

50.$description: Primitive · Violet scale · #F5F3FF · Lightest violet tint. Available for subtle AI surface tinting.

100.$description: Primitive · Violet scale · #EDE9FE · Light violet. Thinking/streaming background in light mode.

200.$description: Primitive · Violet scale · #DDD6FE · Medium-light violet. Available for additional AI tinting.

300.$description: Primitive · Violet scale · #C4B5FD · Soft violet. Available for AI accents on dark surfaces.

400.$description: Primitive · Violet scale · #A78BFA · Accessible violet on dark surfaces. Thinking/streaming border in light mode.

500.$description: Primitive · Violet scale · #8B5CF6 · Core AI violet. Thinking/streaming border in dark mode. Reserved for AI moments — never a general accent.

600.$description: Primitive · Violet scale · #7C3AED · Darker violet for AI accent hover states.

700.$description: Primitive · Violet scale · #6D28D9 · Deep violet. Available for deep AI tinting.

800.$description: Primitive · Violet scale · #5B21B6 · Deeper violet step for dark-mode AI tinting.

900.$description: Primitive · Violet scale · #4C1D95 · Darkest standard violet.

950.$description: Primitive · Violet scale · #2E1065 · Deepest violet. Thinking/streaming background in dark mode.

ai.$description: AI-moment gradient (indigo→purple, 135°). Thinking shimmer, AI CTAs, hero moments. Code: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1, #a855f7)

default.$description: Semantic · Background · Default page canvas. Light: #FFFFFF · Dark: #0F172A. Apply to the root layout surface — the furthest back layer in any view.

neutral.$description: Semantic · Background · Neutral surface. Light: #F8FAFC · Dark: #1E293B. Use for sidebars, panels, and cards that sit one level above the default background.

neutral-subtle.$description: Semantic · Background · Subtle neutral. Light: #F1F5F9 · Dark: #334155. Use for hover states on neutral surfaces, zebra-striped rows, and section dividers.

raised.$description: Semantic · Background · Raised surface. Light: #FFFFFF · Dark: #1E293B. Use for floating elements like cards and popovers that appear elevated above the page.

sunken.$description: Semantic · Background · Sunken surface. Light: #F1F5F9 · Dark: #0A1628. Use for inset content areas such as code editors, input interiors, and wells.

overlay.$description: Semantic · Background · Modal scrim/overlay. Light: rgba(0,0,0,0.36) · Dark: rgba(0,0,0,0.60). Apply behind modals, drawers, and dialogs to dim the content beneath.

primary.$description: Semantic · Background · Primary action fill. Light: indigo/600 (#4F46E5) · Dark: indigo/500 (#6366F1). Use for primary buttons, active navigation items, and focused controls.

primary-hover.$description: Semantic · Background · Primary hover. Light: indigo/700 (#4338CA) · Dark: indigo/400 (#818CF8). Applied on hover over primary-filled elements.

primary-active.$description: Semantic · Background · Primary active. Light: indigo/800 (#3730A3) · Dark: indigo/300 (#A5B4FC). Applied while primary-filled elements are pressed.

primary-subtle.$description: Semantic · Background · Primary tinted surface. Light: indigo/50 (#EEF2FF) · Dark: indigo/950 (#1E1B4B). Use for selected-state backgrounds, highlighted rows, and info banners.

brand.$description: Semantic · Background · Brand fill. Light & Dark: coral/500 (#F97316). Use sparingly for signature brand moments — hero accents, marketing callouts, and brand badges.

brand-hover.$description: Semantic · Background · Brand hover. Light: coral/600 (#EA580C) · Dark: coral/400 (#FB923C). Applied on hover over brand-filled elements.

brand-subtle.$description: Semantic · Background · Brand tinted surface. Light: coral/50 (#FFF7ED) · Dark: coral/950 (#431407). Use for brand-tinted info panels or promotional highlight areas.

success.$description: Semantic · Background · Success fill. Light & Dark: emerald/600 (#059669). Use for success toasts, confirmation banners, and positive-state filled badges.

success-subtle.$description: Semantic · Background · Success tinted surface. Light: emerald/50 (#ECFDF5) · Dark: emerald/950 (#022C22). Use for success-state highlighted rows, inline validation backgrounds, and success banners.

danger.$description: Semantic · Background · Danger fill. Light & Dark: red/600 (#DC2626). Use for destructive action buttons, error toasts, and critical-state filled badges.

danger-subtle.$description: Semantic · Background · Danger tinted surface. Light: red/50 (#FEF2F2) · Dark: red/950 (#450A0A). Use for error-state highlighted rows, inline validation backgrounds, and error banners.

thinking.$description: Semantic · Background · AI · Streaming/generating state. Light: violet/100 (#EDE9FE) · Dark: violet/950 (#2E1065). Apply as the background for components actively generating AI content. Pair with color/border/thinking and an animation for the full streaming effect.

brand-active.$description: Semantic · Background · Brand active. Light: coral/700 (#C2410C) · Dark: coral/300 (#FDBA74). Applied while brand-filled elements are pressed.

warning.$description: Semantic · Background · Warning fill. Light & Dark: amber/500 (#F59E0B). Use for warning toasts, caution banners, and attention-state filled badges. Pair with dark text — white on amber fails WCAG AA.

warning-subtle.$description: Semantic · Background · Warning tinted surface. Light: amber/50 (#FFFBEB) · Dark: amber/950 (#451A03). Use for warning-state highlighted rows, inline validation backgrounds, and caution banners.

default.$description: Semantic · Text · Primary body text. Light: neutral/900 (#0F172A) · Dark: neutral/0 (#FFFFFF). Use for headings, body copy, and any high-importance readable text.

subtle.$description: Semantic · Text · Secondary text. Light: neutral/600 (#475569) · Dark: neutral/400 (#94A3B8). Use for supporting copy, descriptions, and secondary labels.

subtlest.$description: Semantic · Text · Tertiary text. Light: neutral/400 · Dark: neutral/500. Use for placeholder text, hints, metadata, and very low-priority labels.

disabled.$description: Semantic · Text · Disabled text. Light: neutral/400 · Dark: neutral/600. Apply to text inside disabled inputs, buttons, and interactive elements.

inverse.$description: Semantic · Text · Inverse text. Light: neutral/0 (#FFFFFF) · Dark: neutral/900 (#0F172A). Use for text rendered on filled (non-white/black) backgrounds that need contrast reversal.

on-primary.$description: Semantic · Text · On-primary text. Light & Dark: white. Use for labels and icons rendered directly on color/background/primary surfaces.

on-brand.$description: Semantic · Text · On-brand text. Light & Dark: white. Use for labels and icons rendered directly on color/background/brand surfaces.

on-success.$description: Semantic · Text · On-success text. Light & Dark: white. Use for labels inside success-filled badges, buttons, and toasts.

on-danger.$description: Semantic · Text · On-danger text. Light & Dark: white. Use for labels inside danger-filled buttons and error toasts.

primary.$description: Semantic · Text · Primary text color. Light: indigo/600 (#4F46E5) · Dark: indigo/400 (#818CF8). Use for primary-colored text links and emphasized interactive text.

brand.$description: Semantic · Text · Brand text color. Light: coral/600 (#EA580C) · Dark: coral/400 (#FB923C). Use for brand-colored text links and inline brand accents.

success.$description: Semantic · Text · Success text color. Light: emerald/600 (#059669) · Dark: emerald/500 (#10B981). Use for positive validation messages and success status labels.

danger.$description: Semantic · Text · Danger text color. Light: red/600 · Dark: red/500. Use for error messages, destructive action labels, and inline validation errors.

code.$description: Semantic · Text · AI · Code text color. Light: neutral/700 (#334155) · Dark: neutral/200 (#E2E8F0). Use for text inside code blocks, inline code chips, and monospace AI output.

warning.$description: Semantic · Text · Warning text color. Light: amber/600 (#D97706) · Dark: amber/400 (#FBBF24). Use for caution messages and warning status labels.

on-warning.$description: Semantic · Text · On-warning text. Light: neutral/900 (#0F172A) · Dark: neutral/0 (#FFFFFF). Deliberately dark, not white — white text on amber/500 is 2.15:1 contrast (fails WCAG AA); dark neutral gives 8.31:1. Use for labels inside warning-filled badges, buttons, and toasts.

default.$description: Semantic · Border · Default divider and container outline. Light: neutral/200 (#E2E8F0) · Dark: neutral/700 (#334155). Use for cards, inputs, and section dividers at rest.

bold.$description: Semantic · Border · Emphasized border. Light: neutral/400 (#94A3B8) · Dark: neutral/600 (#475569). Use for stronger visual separation or hover state outlines.

focused.$description: Semantic · Border · Keyboard focus outline. Light: indigo/600 (#4F46E5) · Dark: indigo/500 (#6366F1). Apply as the visible border on focused interactive elements. Always pair with color/focus-ring for accessibility.

disabled.$description: Semantic · Border · Disabled element outline. Light: neutral/200 · Dark: neutral/700. Apply to the border of disabled inputs, buttons, and interactive containers.

danger.$description: Semantic · Border · Error/danger outline. Light: red/600 (#DC2626) · Dark: red/500. Use for invalid input fields, error-state containers, and destructive confirmation borders.

success.$description: Semantic · Border · Success outline. Light: emerald/600 (#059669) · Dark: emerald/500 (#10B981). Use for valid input fields and success-state component outlines.

thinking.$description: Semantic · Border · AI · Streaming/generating state border. Light: violet/400 (#A78BFA) · Dark: violet/500 (#8B5CF6). Apply to containers actively streaming AI output. Pair with color/background/thinking and an animation for a pulsing ring effect.

warning.$description: Semantic · Border · Warning outline. Light: amber/600 (#D97706) · Dark: amber/500 (#F59E0B). Use for inputs needing attention and warning-state component outlines.

default.$description: Semantic · Icon · Default icon fill. Light: neutral/600 (#475569) · Dark: neutral/400 (#94A3B8). Use for all standard UI icons at rest.

subtle.$description: Semantic · Icon · Subtle icon fill. Light: neutral/400 (#94A3B8) · Dark: neutral/600 (#475569). Use for decorative, secondary, or low-priority icons.

disabled.$description: Semantic · Icon · Disabled icon fill. Light: neutral/300 (#CBD5E1) · Dark: neutral/700 (#334155). Apply to icons inside disabled controls.

inverse.$description: Semantic · Icon · Inverse icon fill. Light: white · Dark: neutral/900. Use for icons rendered on filled (dark or brand-colored) backgrounds.

primary.$description: Semantic · Icon · Primary icon fill. Light: indigo/600 (#4F46E5) · Dark: indigo/400 (#818CF8). Use for icons that carry the primary interactive color.

brand.$description: Semantic · Icon · Brand icon fill. Light: coral/500 (#F97316) · Dark: coral/400 (#FB923C). Use for icons that carry the brand accent color.

success.$description: Semantic · Icon · Success icon fill. Light: emerald/600 (#059669) · Dark: emerald/500 (#10B981). Use for checkmarks, confirmation icons, and positive-state indicators.

danger.$description: Semantic · Icon · Danger icon fill. Light: red/600 (#DC2626) · Dark: red/500. Use for error icons, destructive warnings, and critical-state indicators.

warning.$description: Semantic · Icon · Warning icon fill. Light: amber/600 (#D97706) · Dark: amber/400 (#FBBF24). Use for caution icons and attention-state indicators.

assistant.$description: Semantic · Surface · AI · Assistant message background. Light: neutral/50 (#F8FAFC) · Dark: neutral/800 (#1E293B). Use as the background for AI-generated message bubbles and assistant response containers. Visually distinct from user messages.

user.$description: Semantic · Surface · AI · User message background. Light: indigo/50 (#EEF2FF) · Dark: indigo/950 (#1E1B4B). Use as the background for user-authored message bubbles in chat UIs.

code.$description: Semantic · Surface · AI · Code block background. Light & Dark: neutral/900 → neutral/1000. Intentionally dark even in light mode to match the universal code-editor convention. Use for multi-line code blocks and syntax-highlighted content.

code-inline.$description: Semantic · Surface · AI · Inline code chip background. Light: neutral/100 (#F1F5F9) · Dark: neutral/800 (#1E293B). Use for short inline code spans within prose — lighter than full code blocks.

focus-ring.$description: Semantic · Effect · Keyboard focus ring glow. Light: rgba(79,70,229,0.40) — indigo/600 at 40% opacity. Dark: rgba(99,102,241,0.40) — indigo/500 at 40% opacity. Apply as a drop-shadow or outline offset effect on focused interactive elements alongside color/border/focused for WCAG-compliant focus visibility.

default.$description: Semantic · Background · Default page canvas. Light: #FFFFFF · Dark: #0F172A. Apply to the root layout surface — the furthest back layer in any view.

neutral.$description: Semantic · Background · Neutral surface. Light: #F8FAFC · Dark: #1E293B. Use for sidebars, panels, and cards that sit one level above the default background.

neutral-subtle.$description: Semantic · Background · Subtle neutral. Light: #F1F5F9 · Dark: #334155. Use for hover states on neutral surfaces, zebra-striped rows, and section dividers.

raised.$description: Semantic · Background · Raised surface. Light: #FFFFFF · Dark: #1E293B. Use for floating elements like cards and popovers that appear elevated above the page.

sunken.$description: Semantic · Background · Sunken surface. Light: #F1F5F9 · Dark: #0A1628. Use for inset content areas such as code editors, input interiors, and wells.

primary.$description: Semantic · Background · Primary action fill. Light: indigo/600 (#4F46E5) · Dark: indigo/500 (#6366F1). Use for primary buttons, active navigation items, and focused controls.

primary-hover.$description: Semantic · Background · Primary hover. Light: indigo/700 (#4338CA) · Dark: indigo/400 (#818CF8). Applied on hover over primary-filled elements.

primary-active.$description: Semantic · Background · Primary active. Light: indigo/800 (#3730A3) · Dark: indigo/300 (#A5B4FC). Applied while primary-filled elements are pressed.

primary-subtle.$description: Semantic · Background · Primary tinted surface. Light: indigo/50 (#EEF2FF) · Dark: indigo/950 (#1E1B4B). Use for selected-state backgrounds, highlighted rows, and info banners.

brand.$description: Semantic · Background · Brand fill. Light & Dark: coral/500 (#F97316). Use sparingly for signature brand moments — hero accents, marketing callouts, and brand badges.

brand-hover.$description: Semantic · Background · Brand hover. Light: coral/600 (#EA580C) · Dark: coral/400 (#FB923C). Applied on hover over brand-filled elements.

brand-subtle.$description: Semantic · Background · Brand tinted surface. Light: coral/50 (#FFF7ED) · Dark: coral/950 (#431407). Use for brand-tinted info panels or promotional highlight areas.

success.$description: Semantic · Background · Success fill. Light & Dark: emerald/600 (#059669). Use for success toasts, confirmation banners, and positive-state filled badges.

success-subtle.$description: Semantic · Background · Success tinted surface. Light: emerald/50 (#ECFDF5) · Dark: emerald/950 (#022C22). Use for success-state highlighted rows, inline validation backgrounds, and success banners.

danger.$description: Semantic · Background · Danger fill. Light & Dark: red/600 (#DC2626). Use for destructive action buttons, error toasts, and critical-state filled badges.

danger-subtle.$description: Semantic · Background · Danger tinted surface. Light: red/50 (#FEF2F2) · Dark: red/950 (#450A0A). Use for error-state highlighted rows, inline validation backgrounds, and error banners.

thinking.$description: Semantic · Background · AI · Streaming/generating state. Light: violet/100 (#EDE9FE) · Dark: violet/950 (#2E1065). Apply as the background for components actively generating AI content. Pair with color/border/thinking and an animation for the full streaming effect.

brand-active.$description: Semantic · Background · Brand active. Light: coral/700 (#C2410C) · Dark: coral/300 (#FDBA74). Applied while brand-filled elements are pressed.

warning.$description: Semantic · Background · Warning fill. Light & Dark: amber/500 (#F59E0B). Use for warning toasts, caution banners, and attention-state filled badges. Pair with dark text — white on amber fails WCAG AA.

warning-subtle.$description: Semantic · Background · Warning tinted surface. Light: amber/50 (#FFFBEB) · Dark: amber/950 (#451A03). Use for warning-state highlighted rows, inline validation backgrounds, and caution banners.

default.$description: Semantic · Text · Primary body text. Light: neutral/900 (#0F172A) · Dark: neutral/0 (#FFFFFF). Use for headings, body copy, and any high-importance readable text.

subtle.$description: Semantic · Text · Secondary text. Light: neutral/600 (#475569) · Dark: neutral/400 (#94A3B8). Use for supporting copy, descriptions, and secondary labels.

subtlest.$description: Semantic · Text · Tertiary text. Light: neutral/400 · Dark: neutral/500. Use for placeholder text, hints, metadata, and very low-priority labels.

disabled.$description: Semantic · Text · Disabled text. Light: neutral/400 · Dark: neutral/600. Apply to text inside disabled inputs, buttons, and interactive elements.

inverse.$description: Semantic · Text · Inverse text. Light: neutral/0 (#FFFFFF) · Dark: neutral/900 (#0F172A). Use for text rendered on filled (non-white/black) backgrounds that need contrast reversal.

on-primary.$description: Semantic · Text · On-primary text. Light & Dark: white. Use for labels and icons rendered directly on color/background/primary surfaces.

on-brand.$description: Semantic · Text · On-brand text. Light & Dark: white. Use for labels and icons rendered directly on color/background/brand surfaces.

on-success.$description: Semantic · Text · On-success text. Light & Dark: white. Use for labels inside success-filled badges, buttons, and toasts.

on-danger.$description: Semantic · Text · On-danger text. Light & Dark: white. Use for labels inside danger-filled buttons and error toasts.

primary.$description: Semantic · Text · Primary text color. Light: indigo/600 (#4F46E5) · Dark: indigo/400 (#818CF8). Use for primary-colored text links and emphasized interactive text.

brand.$description: Semantic · Text · Brand text color. Light: coral/600 (#EA580C) · Dark: coral/400 (#FB923C). Use for brand-colored text links and inline brand accents.

success.$description: Semantic · Text · Success text color. Light: emerald/600 (#059669) · Dark: emerald/500 (#10B981). Use for positive validation messages and success status labels.

danger.$description: Semantic · Text · Danger text color. Light: red/600 · Dark: red/500. Use for error messages, destructive action labels, and inline validation errors.

code.$description: Semantic · Text · AI · Code text color. Light: neutral/700 (#334155) · Dark: neutral/200 (#E2E8F0). Use for text inside code blocks, inline code chips, and monospace AI output.

warning.$description: Semantic · Text · Warning text color. Light: amber/600 (#D97706) · Dark: amber/400 (#FBBF24). Use for caution messages and warning status labels.

on-warning.$description: Semantic · Text · On-warning text. Light & Dark: neutral/900 (#0F172A). Deliberately dark in both modes — background/warning stays the same bright amber/500 in Light and Dark (never shifted), so white text fails WCAG AA (2.15:1) in both modes too; dark neutral gives 8.31:1 either way. Use for labels inside warning-filled badges, buttons, and toasts.

default.$description: Semantic · Border · Default divider and container outline. Light: neutral/200 (#E2E8F0) · Dark: neutral/700 (#334155). Use for cards, inputs, and section dividers at rest.

bold.$description: Semantic · Border · Emphasized border. Light: neutral/400 (#94A3B8) · Dark: neutral/600 (#475569). Use for stronger visual separation or hover state outlines.

focused.$description: Semantic · Border · Keyboard focus outline. Light: indigo/600 (#4F46E5) · Dark: indigo/500 (#6366F1). Apply as the visible border on focused interactive elements. Always pair with color/focus-ring for accessibility.

disabled.$description: Semantic · Border · Disabled element outline. Light: neutral/200 · Dark: neutral/700. Apply to the border of disabled inputs, buttons, and interactive containers.

danger.$description: Semantic · Border · Error/danger outline. Light: red/600 (#DC2626) · Dark: red/500. Use for invalid input fields, error-state containers, and destructive confirmation borders.

success.$description: Semantic · Border · Success outline. Light: emerald/600 (#059669) · Dark: emerald/500 (#10B981). Use for valid input fields and success-state component outlines.

thinking.$description: Semantic · Border · AI · Streaming/generating state border. Light: violet/400 (#A78BFA) · Dark: violet/500 (#8B5CF6). Apply to containers actively streaming AI output. Pair with color/background/thinking and an animation for a pulsing ring effect.

warning.$description: Semantic · Border · Warning outline. Light: amber/600 (#D97706) · Dark: amber/500 (#F59E0B). Use for inputs needing attention and warning-state component outlines.

default.$description: Semantic · Icon · Default icon fill. Light: neutral/600 (#475569) · Dark: neutral/400 (#94A3B8). Use for all standard UI icons at rest.

subtle.$description: Semantic · Icon · Subtle icon fill. Light: neutral/400 (#94A3B8) · Dark: neutral/600 (#475569). Use for decorative, secondary, or low-priority icons.

disabled.$description: Semantic · Icon · Disabled icon fill. Light: neutral/300 (#CBD5E1) · Dark: neutral/700 (#334155). Apply to icons inside disabled controls.

inverse.$description: Semantic · Icon · Inverse icon fill. Light: white · Dark: neutral/900. Use for icons rendered on filled (dark or brand-colored) backgrounds.

primary.$description: Semantic · Icon · Primary icon fill. Light: indigo/600 (#4F46E5) · Dark: indigo/400 (#818CF8). Use for icons that carry the primary interactive color.

brand.$description: Semantic · Icon · Brand icon fill. Light: coral/500 (#F97316) · Dark: coral/400 (#FB923C). Use for icons that carry the brand accent color.

success.$description: Semantic · Icon · Success icon fill. Light: emerald/600 (#059669) · Dark: emerald/500 (#10B981). Use for checkmarks, confirmation icons, and positive-state indicators.

danger.$description: Semantic · Icon · Danger icon fill. Light: red/600 (#DC2626) · Dark: red/500. Use for error icons, destructive warnings, and critical-state indicators.

warning.$description: Semantic · Icon · Warning icon fill. Light: amber/600 (#D97706) · Dark: amber/400 (#FBBF24). Use for caution icons and attention-state indicators.

assistant.$description: Semantic · Surface · AI · Assistant message background. Light: neutral/50 (#F8FAFC) · Dark: neutral/800 (#1E293B). Use as the background for AI-generated message bubbles and assistant response containers. Visually distinct from user messages.

user.$description: Semantic · Surface · AI · User message background. Light: indigo/50 (#EEF2FF) · Dark: indigo/950 (#1E1B4B). Use as the background for user-authored message bubbles in chat UIs.

code.$description: Semantic · Surface · AI · Code block background. Light & Dark: neutral/900 → neutral/1000. Intentionally dark even in light mode to match the universal code-editor convention. Use for multi-line code blocks and syntax-highlighted content.

code-inline.$description: Semantic · Surface · AI · Inline code chip background. Light: neutral/100 (#F1F5F9) · Dark: neutral/800 (#1E293B). Use for short inline code spans within prose — lighter than full code blocks.

focus-ring.$description: Semantic · Effect · Keyboard focus ring glow. Light: rgba(79,70,229,0.40) — indigo/600 at 40% opacity. Dark: rgba(99,102,241,0.40) — indigo/500 at 40% opacity. Apply as a drop-shadow or outline offset effect on focused interactive elements alongside color/border/focused for WCAG-compliant focus visibility.

primary.$description: Component · Button · Background · solid intent=primary. Aliases color/background/primary.

success.$description: Component · Button · Background · solid intent=success. Aliases color/background/success.

danger.$description: Component · Button · Background · solid intent=danger. Aliases color/background/danger.

brand.$description: Component · Button · Background · solid intent=brand. Aliases color/background/brand.

disabled.$description: Component · Button · Background · disabled state across all variants and intents. Aliases color/background/neutral-subtle.

on-filled.$description: Component · Button · Text · Label on solid/filled backgrounds for all intents. Always white. Aliases color/text/on-primary.

disabled.$description: Component · Button · Text · Label in disabled state. Aliases color/text/disabled.

focused.$description: Component · Button · Border · Keyboard focus outline color. Aliases color/border/focused.

focus-ring.$description: Component · Button · Effect · Focus ring glow applied on :focus-visible. Aliases color/focus-ring.

radius.$description: Component · Button · Shape · Border radius. Aliases radius/md (6px).

sm.$description: Component · Button · Space · Horizontal padding for size=sm (12px). Aliases space/150.

md.$description: Component · Button · Space · Horizontal padding for size=md (16px). Aliases space/200.

lg.$description: Component · Button · Space · Horizontal padding for size=lg (24px). Aliases space/300.

sm.$description: Component · Button · Space · Vertical padding for size=sm (6px). Aliases space/075.

md.$description: Component · Button · Space · Vertical padding for size=md (8px). Aliases space/100.

lg.$description: Component · Button · Space · Vertical padding for size=lg (12px). Aliases space/150.

icon-gap.$description: Component · Button · Space · Gap between icon and label (8px). Aliases space/100.

sm.$description: Component · Button · Typography · Font size for size=sm (14px). Aliases typography/font-size/sm.

md.$description: Component · Button · Typography · Font size for size=md (16px). Aliases typography/font-size/md.

lg.$description: Component · Button · Typography · Font size for size=lg (18px). Aliases typography/font-size/lg.

font-weight.$description: Component · Button · Typography · Label weight (500/medium). Aliases typography/font-weight/medium.

line-height.$description: Component · Button · Typography · Line height (1.25/tight). Aliases typography/line-height/tight.

sm.$description: Component · Button · Size · Minimum height for size=sm (32px). Direct value — no semantic alias.

md.$description: Component · Button · Size · Minimum height for size=md (40px). Direct value — no semantic alias.

lg.$description: Component · Button · Size · Minimum height for size=lg (48px). Direct value — no semantic alias.

neutral.$description: Component · Badge · Background · intent=neutral. Subtle gray tint. Aliases color/background/neutral-subtle.

primary.$description: Component · Badge · Background · intent=primary. Subtle indigo tint. Aliases color/background/primary-subtle.

success.$description: Component · Badge · Background · intent=success. Subtle emerald tint. Aliases color/background/success-subtle.

danger.$description: Component · Badge · Background · intent=danger. Subtle red tint. Aliases color/background/danger-subtle.

brand.$description: Component · Badge · Background · intent=brand. Subtle coral tint. Aliases color/background/brand-subtle.

neutral.$description: Component · Badge · Text · intent=neutral. Aliases color/text/subtle.

primary.$description: Component · Badge · Text · intent=primary. Aliases color/text/primary.

success.$description: Component · Badge · Text · intent=success. Aliases color/text/success.

danger.$description: Component · Badge · Text · intent=danger. Aliases color/text/danger.

brand.$description: Component · Badge · Text · intent=brand. Aliases color/text/brand.

radius.$description: Component · Badge · Shape · Border radius. Aliases radius/md (6px).

sm.$description: Component · Badge · Space · Horizontal padding for size=sm (8px). Aliases space/100.

md.$description: Component · Badge · Space · Horizontal padding for size=md (12px). Aliases space/150.

lg.$description: Component · Badge · Space · Horizontal padding for size=lg (16px). Aliases space/200.

sm.$description: Component · Badge · Space · Vertical padding for size=sm (4px). Aliases space/050.

md.$description: Component · Badge · Space · Vertical padding for size=md (8px). Aliases space/100.

lg.$description: Component · Badge · Space · Vertical padding for size=lg (12px). Aliases space/150.

font-size.$description: Component · Badge · Typography · Font size (12px/xs). Aliases typography/font-size/xs.

font-weight.$description: Component · Badge · Typography · Label weight (500/medium). Aliases typography/font-weight/medium.

line-height.$description: Component · Badge · Typography · Line height (1.25/tight). Aliases typography/line-height/tight.

gap.$description: Component · ButtonGroup · Space · Gap between sibling buttons (8px). Aliases space/100.

sans.$value: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif
sans.$description: Typography · Font family · System sans-serif stack. The default UI font. Falls back gracefully across all platforms.

mono.$value: "Fira Code", "Cascadia Code", "JetBrains Mono", Menlo, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace
mono.$description: Typography · Font family · Monospace stack (Fira Code, Cascadia Code, JetBrains Mono, Menlo, Consolas). Use for code blocks, inline code, terminal output, and AI-generated code responses.

xs.$description: Typography · Font size · 12px · Extra-small text. Use for captions, timestamps, legal text, and inline metadata.

sm.$description: Typography · Font size · 14px · Small text. Use for secondary labels, helper text, and compact UI elements.

md.$description: Typography · Font size · 16px · Base body size. The default reading size for most UI text.

lg.$description: Typography · Font size · 18px · Large body. Use for prominent body copy or comfortable reading in content-heavy views.

xl.$description: Typography · Font size · 20px · Small heading. Use for card titles and sub-section headings.

2xl.$description: Typography · Font size · 24px · Medium heading. Use for section titles and dialog headings.

3xl.$description: Typography · Font size · 30px · Large heading. Use for page titles and hero text.

normal.$description: Typography · Font weight · 400 · Regular weight. Default for body text, descriptions, and helper content.

medium.$description: Typography · Font weight · 500 · Medium weight. Use for interactive labels, navigation items, and mild emphasis.

semibold.$description: Typography · Font weight · 600 · Semibold. Use for headings, button labels, and strong emphasis within body text.

bold.$description: Typography · Font weight · 700 · Bold. Use for prominent headings, critical callouts, and maximum emphasis.

tight.$description: Typography · Line height · 1.25 · Tight leading. Use for headings and single-line display text where vertical compactness matters.

normal.$description: Typography · Line height · 1.5 · Standard leading. The default for body text and multi-line UI copy.

relaxed.$description: Typography · Line height · 1.75 · Relaxed leading. Use for long-form reading, AI response text, and documentation content.

100.$description: Space · 8px · Small spacing (sm in code). Use for gaps inside compact components and between grouped items.

150.$description: Space · 12px · Medium-small spacing (md in code). Use for internal padding in small components like buttons and inputs.

200.$description: Space · 16px · Base spacing (lg in code). The standard internal padding unit for most components and section gaps.

250.$description: Space · 20px · Medium-large spacing. Use for slightly roomier component padding or moderate section separation.

300.$description: Space · 24px · Large spacing (xl in code). Use for section gaps, card padding, and breathing room between content blocks.

400.$description: Space · 32px · Extra-large spacing (xxl in code). Use for major section separations and generous layout gutters.

500.$description: Space · 40px · 2x-large spacing. Use for wide layout gutters and prominent section breaks.

600.$description: Space · 48px · 3x-large spacing. Use for page-level vertical rhythm between major content areas.

800.$description: Space · 64px · 4x-large spacing. Use for hero-level separation between distinct page sections.

050.$description: Space · 4px · Extra-tight spacing. Use for gaps between tightly related elements — icon-to-label, badge offsets, fine internal padding.

075.$description: Space · 6px · Tight spacing. Use for compact vertical rhythm within dense components like tags and chips.

none.$description: Shape · 0px · No rounding. Use for sharp-cornered elements like dividers, table cells, and full-bleed images.

sm.$description: Shape · 4px · Subtle rounding. Use for small components: badges, tags, chips, tooltips, and input fields.

md.$description: Shape · 6px · Standard rounding. The default border radius for most interactive components: buttons, cards, and modals.

lg.$description: Shape · 8px · Generous rounding. Use for larger containers like panels, popovers, and drawers.

xl.$description: Shape · 12px · Extra rounding. Use for prominent cards, sheet surfaces, and floating panels in AI/app UIs.

full.$description: Shape · 9999px · Full pill shape. Use for rounded buttons, avatar frames, toggle switches, and status indicators.
